title: phyllanthus calycinus
intro: Phyllanthus calycinus, also known as the fruited phyllanthus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus calycinus include the potential to treat liver diseases, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various viral infections. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
